response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced software developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and breadth of expertise exceed the requirements for this junior/mid-level role. While his skills in TypeScript, React, and databases align well with the job, his extensive experience in leadership and advanced technologies (e.g., AI, Kubernetes) may not be fully utilized in this position. His passion for open-source and renewable energy projects is a positive signal for cultural fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, React, and PostgreSQL-compatible databases (MongoDB, SQL).
Proven track record in building scalable platforms, including a renewable energy/geo-data project (GISCollective).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating passion for technology and collaboration.
concerns: Overqualified for the role; may seek more senior responsibilities or higher compensation.
Limited explicit mention of REST API or Nest.js experience, though likely transferable from other frameworks.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current remote-friendly or hybrid roles.
